overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character in dark robes exploring a gothic castle dormitory with stone arches, green house banners, and fireplaces. The character transitions through a common room with other students and descends into underground corridors with green-tinted windows.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the lit fireplace and examining the room

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantelpiece
green and silver house banner hanging above the fireplace
upholstered armchair with high back near the fireplace
wooden four-poster bed with green curtains and trunk at foot
small round table with cakes and pastries

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a gothic dormitory room with a large stone fireplace burning in the center background. Green house banners hang above the mantelpiece, and a four-poster bed with green curtains is visible to the right. The character walks slowly toward the fireplace, passing a dessert table on the left.

events.description: character tilts camera upward to look at the stained glass ceiling dome

agents.ego_description: walking past the beds and looking up at the ornate ceiling

entered.detail: circular stained glass dome with colorful geometric patterns
vintage-style cream colored sofa against the wall
second four-poster bed with dark wood frame and green drapes

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the dormitory, passing multiple four-poster beds with green curtains. The camera tilts up to reveal an ornate stained glass dome ceiling. A cream-colored sofa sits against the left wall as the character circles around the room.

events.description: character exits dormitory through wooden door into stairwell
descends stairs into larger common room with other students

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway, descending the grand staircase, and entering the common room

notable_agents.action: group of students in black robes conversing near a display case

entered.detail: dark wooden door with glass panels leading out of the dormitory
wide stone staircase with ornate balustrades descending to lower level
green upholstered sofa with serpent-shaped armrests
animal skeleton mounted on a wooden cabinet
lit wall-mounted lamps with multiple bulbs

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory through a wooden door and descends a grand stone staircase into a larger common room. Other students in black robes stand conversing near display cases. The room features serpent-shaped sofas and warm lighting from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground corridor with green glass windows

events.description: enters narrow stone corridor with arched ceiling and green tinted windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit underground corridor

entered.detail: long stone corridor with repeating gothic arches overhead
narrow windows with green tinted glass set high in the wall
decorative wrought iron railings along the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit underground corridor with green-tinted glass windows along the left wall. The stone corridor features gothic arches overhead and decorative iron railings. The character walks steadily forward through the enclosed passageway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cozy intimacy of a gothic dormitory into the cold, enclosed depths of an underground corridor. It begins with the character walking past a dessert table toward a burning stone fireplace adorned with green house banners and a nearby four-poster bed. As the character circles the room, the camera tilts upward to reveal an ornate stained glass dome ceiling before moving past a cream-colored sofa toward a wooden exit. The scene then shifts as the character descends a grand stone staircase into a warm common room filled with conversing students and serpent-shaped sofas, before finally transitioning into a narrow, dimly lit underground passageway. This final stretch features gothic arches and green-tinted glass windows that line the stone walls as the character walks steadily forward.
